info.description: API Server for SWD392 Chatbot RAG system.
info.title: SWD392 Chatbot RAG API

post.description: Add a new academic term (Admin only)

put.description: Update academic term name/order by ID (Admin only)

delete.description: Remove academic term by ID (Admin only)

post.description: Add a new document source (Admin only)

put.description: Update source name by ID (Admin only)

delete.description: Remove document source by ID (Admin only)

post.description: Add a new document type (Admin only)

put.description: Update document type details by ID (Admin only)

delete.description: Remove document type by ID (Admin only)

get.description: Get a paginated list of all system documents with status (Admin only)

post.description: Set document status to approved, making it public (Admin only)
Admin delete a document by ID (Admin only)

put.description: Update language code/name by ID (Admin only)

get.description: Get list of all pending document reports (Admin only)

post.description: Resolve a violation report by ignoring or deleting the document (Admin only)

put.description: Update subject code/name/term by ID (Admin only)

get.description: Get a list of all users in the system (Admin only)

post.description: Block a user's account by ID (Admin only)
Unblock a user's account by ID (Admin only)

get.description: Get a paginated list of all public documents with optional filtering

parameters.description: Sort order (date_desc, date_asc, title_asc, title_desc, views_asc, views_desc)
parameters.name: sortBy

get.description: Get document, file, and chunk count statistics for the logged-in lecturer
Get dropdown listings of academic terms, subjects, types, sources, languages
Get a list of documents owned by the logged-in lecturer

post.description: Upload a document file (PDF/DOC/DOCX/PPT/PPTX) and start indexing

get.description: Get detailed information of a document including files, chapters, and paginated chunks

post.description: Delete document from database and S3 (only owner lecturer can delete)

get.description: View statistics of files and chunks that will be deleted prior to confirmation

post.description: Update metadata info of a document owned by the lecturer
Send a violation report for a document

get.description: Check if the service is running
